scope.target: Perform an independent post-remediation audit and save reports/03-post-remediation-audit-report.md.

validation: Every resolved or partial finding is independently verified
Regressions and new findings are recorded

results.summary: Independent post-remediation audit completed. AIC-001, AIC-002, AIC-003, AIC-004, AIC-005, AIC-006, AIC-008, and AIC-009 are resolved for their baseline scope. AIC-007 remains a confirmed HIGH finding and is intentionally deferred to a dedicated tooling workflow. No regression or new finding was identified.
